results.rendered_html: jaimini m. (= ˚mani) N. of a celebrated sage and philosopher (he was a pupil of Vyāsa [who made over to him the  SV. ;  BhP. i, 4, 21 ;  VāyuP. ]  SāmavBr. ;  MBh. i f. , xii ; and was Udgātṛ priest at Janamejaya's snake-sacrifice, i, 2046 ; and was founder of the Pūrva- or Karma-Mīmāṃsā,  Pañcat. ;  Madhus. ),  ĀśvGṛ. iii, 4 ;  ŚāṅkhGṛ. ;  Pravar. i, 4 ; iv, 1 ;  Hariv. ;  Bādar.  &c.
